0.q: ApKUP4 overexpression in Arabidopsis plants enhanced plant tolerance to salinity stress, as evidenced by reduced water loss and ROS generation, associated with enhanced photosynthesis, nutritional status, and enzymatic antioxidants.

1.q: Arabidopsis plants overexpressing ApKUP4 showed improved growth and K+ homeostasis.

2.q: Arabidopsis plants overexpressing ApKUP4 showed improved growth and K+ homeostasis.

3.q: The distinctive K+ accumulation capability of alligatorweed is linked to a high-affinity K+ transport facilitated by K+-uptake transporters (ApKUPs).
